steps.title: Identify what action legitimacy requires
steps.content: The passage states that legitimacy cannot be understood without understanding “the factors that allowed the monarch to ______ his right to hold the throne.” The blank must describe the specific action a monarch took to establish his claim to power.

steps.title: Match the word to the action
steps.content: ”Buttress” means to strengthen or support — the precise action required to establish legitimate rule. The other three choices describe unrelated actions that don't reinforce a claim to power. That matches choice C — C is correct.
